title: Another Written Upon A Window Where There Was No Writing Before (Epigrams On Windows)
content:
Thanks to my stars, I once can see
    A window here from scribbling free!
    Here no conceited coxcombs pass,
    To scratch their paltry drabs on glass;
    Nor party fool is calling names,
    Or dealing crowns to George and James.
meaning:
"Another Written Upon A Window Where There Was No Writing Before (Epigrams On Windows)" is a quintessential example of Jonathan Swift's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
